title: Senior Frontend at BeeData Analytics
description: Development of complex reporting engines and data visualization interfaces with Web Components and REST APIs in scalable Node.js environments.
body: At **BeeData Analytics**, specializing in advanced data analytics, I participated in the development of their reporting and visualization tools, creating technically complex interfaces aimed at presenting large volumes of information. ## Reporting engines The core of the work was to build **reporting engines** capable of processing and representing data in a clear and interactive way. This required very careful design of the frontend architecture to ensure performance and flexibility. ## Data visualization with Web Components I implemented custom **Web Components** for data visualization interfaces, integrated with backend **REST APIs**. Using **D3.js** made it possible to generate highly configurable graphics and visual representations. ## Scalable architecture The frontend was built on **Node.js** environments, with an architecture designed to scale and add new modules without breaking the existing system. Collaboration with the Python side of the backend was constant to coordinate the data structure. ## Technologies - JavaScript (ES6+) - Web Components - REST APIs - HTML5/CSS3 - SCSS - NPM - D3.js - Python Company: [beedataanalytics.com](https://beedataanalytics.com/)
